tracks.meaning: a set of instructions written in a programming language that a computer executes to perform specific tasks
software or an application designed to perform particular functions on a device
a printed leaflet or document distributed to an audience listing the performance details and cast
a plan of things to be done or carried out in a specific sequence
a schedule or organized plan of activities or events arranged for a particular period
a television or radio broadcast or series of broadcasts with a particular theme or content
a piece of music performed in a concert or recital
to train or teach someone to do something through regular practice or instruction
a process, sequence of events, or course of action that is predetermined or predetermined
